args.text: Incident ownership confirmed. Beginning remediation of duplicate charge fault affecting orders ORD-5501, ORD-5502, ORD-5503.
Guard fix confirmed live. billing-api v3.4.1 deployed with double_charge_guard enabled. Ready to proceed with customer refunds.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: We have issued a refund of $19.99 to your account for the duplicate billing charge from the May 12 billing cycle. The refund should appear within 1-3 business days. We apologize for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body:
Billing incident TCK-2201 has been remediated. Three customer refunds totaling $79.96 have been issued:

- ORD-5501: $19.99 (amara.osei@fernpost.example)
- ORD-5502: $19.99 (jonas.beck@quillmail.example)
- ORD-5503: $39.98 (priya.nair@lumenpost.example)

All customers have been notified. The root cause (disabled double-charge guard) has been corrected and deployed in billing-api v3.4.1. See refunds-summary.md for full details.
